message:
Fix memory ordering in CircuitBreaker and Notify permit acquisition

Changed the `compare_exchange_weak` success orderings from `Ordering::Release` to `Ordering::Acquire` when acquiring a probe slot in `CircuitBreaker::should_allow` and when consuming a stored notification in `Notify::notify_waiters` and `Notify::notify_one`.

Because these operations consume a resource (a probe permit or a notification signal) produced by another thread, their successful CAS must form a synchronize-with edge via `Ordering::Acquire` to ensure visibility of memory written prior to the release of the permit/signal.
